q: Does this replace Claude Code or Cursor?
a: No — Slovey sits beneath them. Your agents keep writing code exactly as they do today; we review every change against your company’s context and send fixes back before anything is committed.

q: How does it learn my company?
a: It continuously ingests your GitHub repos, pull requests, ADRs, docs, code reviews, incidents, and human corrections — turning them into a structured Engineering Decision Graph that both people and AI can query.

q: Where does my code and data live?
a: On Team, data is encrypted and isolated per organization. Enterprise supports self-hosted and VPC deployments with SSO, SCIM, and full audit logging — your code never leaves your boundary.

q: Which tools does it integrate with?
a: GitHub, Slack, Notion, Jira, and Confluence out of the box, plus a REST API and an MCP server so any AI agent can connect to your engineering memory directly.

q: How does the MCP server work?
a: Instead of every AI tool re-learning your company independently, they connect to Slovey over MCP and ask it first — making it the trusted source of decisions, architecture, and standards.
You can connect a repository in minutes. Basic guardrails work on day one; the decision graph gets sharper with every review, PR, and correction your team makes.
